raw_consumer_statement:
I owned a business credit card for XXXX XXXX from Citibank. 

I had a dispute with the merchant XXXX XXXX which got finally resolved and I decided to retract the dispute. 

I called Citibank to cancel the dispute process as I had the resolution from the merchant XXXX  XXXX  afterwards of filing the dispute. 

The amount was {$190.00} for the transaction dated XX/XX/year> that was already paid in full for the XXXX statement cycle on XX/XX/year> which was the due date of the business credit card. 

The dispute was filed was way later in XXXXXXXX XXXX  and I got a credit balance ( negative ) of {$190.00} as the immediate credit post filing the dispute. 

But, when I decided to " Cancel '' the dispute, Citibank erroneously reversed the charge TWICE and not ready to accept their mistake of billing me twice for the same transaction.
